programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Romance with Emily Alatalo. An undercover policewoman on the trail of a jewel thief discovers that the handsome felon may not have stolen the diamonds - but he has made away with her heart! (2018)
